provenance.subject: Physics
provenance.chapterTitle: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

questions.text: The center of mass of a uniform rod is at:
questions.explanation: For a uniform rod, the center of mass is at its geometric center (middle point).

questions.text: Angular momentum is the rotational analogue of linear momentum.
questions.explanation: Angular momentum (L) is the rotational analogue of linear momentum (p). L = Iω corresponds to p = mv.

questions.text: The moment of inertia of a solid sphere about its diameter is ________.
questions.explanation: For a solid sphere of mass M and radius R, I = (2/5)MR² about its diameter.

questions.correctAnswer: Torque is the turning effect of force. τ = r × F = rF sin θ
questions.explanation: Torque (τ) is the rotational analogue of force. It equals the cross product of position vector and force.
